steps: Confirm prisma/schema.prisma exists with correct output path (app/generated/prisma)
Populate .env.local with BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, BETTER_AUTH_URL, GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, DATABASE_URL
Verify data/ directory exists for SQLite file
Confirm tailwind.config.ts and next.config.ts are correct

description: Prisma schema: better-auth tables + Note model
steps: Run `npx @better-auth/cli generate` to append user, session, account, verification models
Add Note model with id, userId, title, content, isShared, shareToken, createdAt, updatedAt
Run `npx prisma migrate dev --name init`
Run `npx prisma generate` and verify client at app/generated/prisma
Write test: assert Note model can be created/read via Prisma client
Write test: importing db does not throw, db is a PrismaClient instance
Create lib/db.ts exporting a singleton PrismaClient
Confirm DATABASE_URL is consumed correctly
Write test: auth object is defined and has expected shape
Create lib/auth.ts using betterAuth with prismaAdapter, emailAndPassword, and Google social provider
Confirm env vars GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET are referenced
Write test: authClient is defined
Create lib/auth-client.ts using createAuthClient()
Write test: GET /api/auth/[...all] route exists and responds
Create route.ts that exports GET and POST handlers from better-auth
Write test: unauthenticated request to /notes redirects to /login
Create middleware.ts at project root
Use better-auth getSession to detect session
Redirect to /login for protected paths; redirect logged-in users away from /login and /register
Define matcher for (app) routes and auth routes
Write test: RegisterForm renders email, password fields and submit button
Write test: successful submission calls authClient.signUp.email
Create RegisterForm.tsx client component with Zod validation
Create register/page.tsx rendering RegisterForm
Redirect to /notes on success
Write test: LoginForm renders email, password fields and Google button
Write test: successful email submission calls authClient.signIn.email
Write test: Google button calls authClient.signIn.social
Create LoginForm.tsx client component with Zod validation
Create login/page.tsx rendering LoginForm
Redirect to /notes on success
Write test: sign-out button calls authClient.signOut and redirects to /login
Add Sign Out button to app shell nav bar
Call authClient.signOut() on click

steps: Write test: Button renders with correct label and handles onClick

Write test: ConfirmDialog shows/hides based on open prop and calls onConfirm/onCancel

Create components/ui/Input.tsx
Create components/ui/ConfirmDialog.tsx

Include app logo and sign-out button in nav

Write test: onUpdate callback fires when content changes

Configure StarterKit + CodeBlockLowlight extensions per SPEC section 7.1
Persist content as JSON.stringify(editor.getJSON())

Write test: Bold button calls toggleBold on editor

Highlight active state for each button using editor.isActive()

Create ReadOnlyEditor.tsx with editable: false
Accept pre-parsed JSON content as prop

Write test: NoteList renders a NoteCard for each note
Create components/notes/NoteCard.tsx
Create components/notes/NoteList.tsx
Write test: shows share URL and copy button when isShared is true
Write test: shows Share button when isShared is false
Write test: copy button writes URL to clipboard
Create ShareControls.tsx accepting isShared, shareToken, and onToggle props

description: Zod schemas for note server actions (lib/schemas/notes.ts)
steps: Write test: createNoteSchema rejects empty title, accepts valid input
Write test: updateNoteSchema requires id
Create lib/schemas/notes.ts with createNoteSchema, updateNoteSchema, deleteNoteSchema
title: string, max 255 chars; content: string

steps: Write test: createNote inserts a note and returns the new id

Write test: deleteNote removes note and redirects to /notes
Write test: toggleShare flips isShared and generates shareToken on first share

Use Zod schemas from lib/schemas/notes.ts for input validation
